summary: Disappointing show with an oddly brief first set; recording quality not mentioned.
review: The lone reviewer complains that the first set was unbelievably short, calling it a bummer for the concert experience. No remarks are made about audio fidelity or source type, so the technical quality of the recording remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief 1‑star review focusing on a short first set; no information about the audio, leading to a low overall rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix balance, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as unusually short, which reviewers felt detracted from the concert's pacing and enjoyment.
